tweets.text: This year @SecBlinken traveled more than 250,000 miles to support international relations and work toward a more peaceful and prosperous world. Here's a collection of some of the most memorable moments. https://t.co/aanspdk9x8

Our @StateDeptDSS special agents go through rigorous training to protect our missions globally. Some of their training looks like it comes straight out of an action film. Earlier this year, @SecBlinken got a “crash course” in their training. Full video: https://t.co/6YmvO6bslq https://t.co/g2yPjbRQ1T
As we prepare to say goodbye to 2023 and get ready for 2024, join us for a look back at a year of diplomatic efforts serving the American people at home and around the world. https://t.co/e51blf3MYr
America stands for freedom today, tomorrow, and always. America stands against tyranny and against oppression. America stands with the people of Ukraine. https://t.co/f9RpB1FXz2

“Putin has failed. Failed in his effort to subjugate Ukraine. The brave people of Ukraine have defied Putin’s will at every turn, backed by the strong and unwavering support of the United States and our allies and partners in more than fifty nations. ” — @POTUS https://t.co/qJUZHRhdZJ
This year, Finland joined @NATO. Sweden will join soon and bring even greater capacity and capability to our defensive Alliance. We are stronger together. https://t.co/Cm2wBIVg4W
Putin has already failed to achieve his principal objective in Ukraine: erasing it from the map, subsuming it into Russia. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/wypcbh7zkD

We’re more determined than ever to ensure that out of this horrific tragedy comes a moment of possibility for Israelis, for Palestinians, for the region to live in lasting peace and lasting security; that out of this darkness comes light. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/Nn1lIj4aCd

The U.S. will continue to compete vigorously with the People's Republic of China. But we’ll manage that competition responsibly so it doesn’t veer into conflict or accidental conflict. And where it’s possible, where our interests coincide, we’re going to work together. -@POTUS https://t.co/XqGYB8gfIM

Our efforts to restore high-level diplomacy with China have allowed us to take practical steps to reduce the risk that competition veers into conflict, as well as to make progress on issues that matter in the lives of our fellow citizens. https://t.co/DTfHlwq0zy

The U.S. is addressing irregular migration throughout the region at the source. Together, we are helping countries throughout the region to become safer and more secure by providing the foundation for a better and more hopeful future for all. https://t.co/BWbtWEaUSn

The United States is working with partners in the Americas to advance safe, orderly, humane migration. Check out Diomaris and Alexis’ story on how the Safe Mobility initiative is supporting refugees and vulnerable migrants through safe and lawful pathways. https://t.co/tKS1MPETWM

This year @SecBlinken traveled more than 250,000 miles to support international relations and work toward a more peaceful and prosperous world. Here's a collection of some of the most memorable moments. https://t.co/aanspdkHmG

Check out #WalksWithTony, where he talks about the important work of 
@StateDeptDSS special agents around the world and visits our training facility earlier this summer. https://t.co/MlX9LpL09u
Happy Kwanzaa! May the seven principles of Kwanzaa inspire reflection, unity, and joy. https://t.co/BjJ0fBnIuo
As families and friends gather to celebrate, may it be a joyful and merry Christmas for all. https://t.co/IpDjh4s04L

In “The Week at State,” we announced a new partnership with the @‌Smithsonian, @VP Harris chaired a National Space Council meeting, and @‌SecBlinken met with reporters for an end of the year press conference. https://t.co/TthBXDblKd

Collaboration on space delivers. We’ve seen that most recently with the launch of the James Webb Space Telescope and the landing of a rover on Mars – both projects that were made possible by international partnership and international collaboration. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/zLktWj5BbZ

With our colleagues at @NASA, we’ve grown the coalition of countries under the Artemis Accords, a set of practical principles to guide safe, peaceful, and sustainable space exploration and cooperation. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/QNI2ENSbUu

The @AfghanEvac community demonstrates what America is at its best: a compassionate country, full of big-hearted people from different backgrounds, ready to drop everything and work as one team to help others. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/OFlTYycfXE
